title: The many deaths of Mario Part 1
description:
This is a test video to see if you guys like this, if you like it I might make more and try to upload one video each one or two days.

I was going to play this game anyway so why not record it and upload it so you can see me die over and over...

But the real reason is I was playing the game and my friend was dying laughing beside me watching me die over and over and rage so I got the idea of recording myself so you guys may laugh at me too. =( (Of course you cannot hear me rage, good for me!!)
